summary: Comprehensive testing of Actor's Companion new features: Guided Upload Flow (3-step stepper) and Memorization Mode Overhaul (3 tabs). All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Frontend: Step 1 shows 'Paste script' button (data-testid='input-type-text')
Frontend: Step 1 shows 'Upload file' button (data-testid='input-type-file')
Frontend: Clicking 'Paste script' advances to Step 2 with textarea
Frontend: Clicking 'Upload file' advances to Step 2 with file upload zone
Frontend: Step 2 shows Quick/Deep mode toggle (data-testid='mode-toggle')
Frontend: Step 2 shows 'Continue' button when text is entered (data-testid='step-next-2')
Frontend: Step 2 'Back' button returns to Step 1 (data-testid='step-back-2')
Frontend: Step 3 shows summary bar with line count and mode badge
Frontend: Step 3 shows expandable 'Add context' section with all fields
Frontend: Step 3 'Deep Analysis' button text for deep mode, 'Analyze My Sides' for quick mode
Frontend: Step 3 'Back' button returns to Step 2 (data-testid='step-back-3')
Frontend: Full flow - paste text -> select mode -> continue -> analyze -> breakdown shows
Frontend: Recent breakdowns only show on Step 1 (hidden on Steps 2 and 3)
Frontend: Memorization mode has three tabs: 'Line Run', 'Reader', 'Cue & Recall'
Frontend: Line Run is the default tab when memorization opens
Frontend: Line Run shows cue text ('They say:') and 'Tap to reveal your line' button
Frontend: Line Run shows 'Nailed it' and 'Peeked' buttons after reveal
Frontend: Line Run tracks progress (nailed/peeked counters visible in progress bar)
Frontend: Line Run shows 'Run Complete' screen with Nailed/Peeked counts
Frontend: Line Run 'Run Again' button resets the drill
Frontend: Reader tab shows chunk navigation (prev/next buttons)
Frontend: Reader tab shows chunk text with reveal/hide toggle
Frontend: Cue & Recall tab shows cue-recall pairs with tap-to-reveal
Backend: GET /api/ returns 200 - API health check
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text with mode=quick returns 200 with memorization data
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text with mode=deep returns 200 with memorization data
Backend: GET /api/breakdowns returns list of breakdowns
Backend: GET /api/breakdowns/{id} returns breakdown with memorization.cue_recall array
Backend: Memorization cue_recall has correct format (cue/your_line pairs)
Backend: Memorization chunked_lines has correct format for Reader tab
Backend: GET /api/tts/status returns available status
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: BreakdownView uses data-testid='memorization-button' but earlier tests expected 'open-memorization-button' - consider standardizing naming convention
seed_data_creation: None - used existing breakdowns and created new ones via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guided Upload Flow and Memorization Mode Overhaul fully tested. Key data-testids: input-type-text, input-type-file, script-textarea, mode-toggle, mode-quick, mode-deep, step-next-2, step-back-2, step-back-3, toggle-context-button, analyze-button, memorization-button, memorization-overlay, memorization-linerun-tab, memorization-reader-tab, memorization-cue-tab, reveal-line-button, mark-nailed, mark-peeked, run-again-button. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_guided_upload_memorization.py can be reused for regression testing.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No bugs found. All Guided Upload Flow and Memorization Mode features working correctly.
